note: Canon-grounded (FFG L5R 5E) + adversarially verified. Default 5E era (~1123). Consult before inventing Imperial/court/legal facts.

throne.title: The Emperor — 'the Hantei' (dynastic title). No personal given name is set in the refs; the Hantei line has run OVER THIRTY-NINE GENERATIONS. [corrected: do NOT assert a specific '39th-generation' emperor — it is a rhetorical dynastic count.]
throne.seat: The Imperial throne — attested as both the 'Emerald Throne' and the 'Chrysanthemum Throne' — in the Imperial Palace atop the Imperial Mound, Forbidden City of Otosan Uchi.
throne.mandate: Holds the Mandate of Heaven as descendant of Amaterasu; divine authority over all clans. The aging Emperor's favor is the prize of the current Crane–Scorpion court war.

hands_of_the_emperor.left_hand: CRANE — draft laws and issue edicts; the Throne's political/administrative arm; supported by the Otomo, Miya, and Emerald Magistrates.
hands_of_the_emperor.right_hand: LION — the Emperor's personal army and martial enforcers; supported by the Seppun and the Imperial Legions.

imperial_families.name: Miya
imperial_families.role: Heralds & bureaucrats — the Imperial Heralds travel Rokugan to promulgate Imperial edicts.

imperial_families.name: Otomo
imperial_families.role: Courtiers & bureaucrats — masters of court intrigue who keep the clans divided so none grows too powerful; run the Legion support bureaucracy; created the Sentaku Tribunal.

imperial_families.name: Seppun
imperial_families.role: The Emperor's hereditary bodyguards & spiritual wardens — Palace/Honor Guard + Hidden Guard; one of the families Legion COMMANDERS are drawn from. [The PC's secret bloodline — the natural door into Imperial service.]

courts_and_law.emerald_magistrates: Empire-wide ('national') magistrates; appointed by the EMERALD CHAMPION (himself chosen by a ceremonial dueling tournament) on the Emperor's behalf; drawn from any Great Clan, expected to set clan rivalry aside; use yoriki (deputies) and dōshin (peasant enforcers).
courts_and_law.jade_magistrates: Shugenja magistrates appointed by the Jade Champion; tasked with crimes touching the supernatural / Shadowlands Taint / maho.
courts_and_law.clan_magistrates: Appointed by clan/provincial daimyō; enforce the clan's & Emperor's law within the clan's lands; may appoint their own yoriki.
courts_and_law.justice_is_testimony_based: [corrected — load-bearing] Rokugani criminal justice considers EYEWITNESS TESTIMONY (including confession, often via torture) the only fully valid evidence; physical evidence usually has little standing. The Kitsuki (Dragon) evidence-based method is the celebrated EXCEPTION, not the norm — a key wrinkle for any investigation plot.
courts_and_law.sentaku_tribunal: Created by the Otomo in the 5th century; controls access to the Forbidden City and the Imperial Court.

source: emerald-empire.md (Army of the Emperor, Hands of the Emperor, Seppun/Otomo/Miya, Sentaku); intro-rokugan.md; running-the-game.md (magistrates, Emerald Champion).
